# Nature Formed Landscaping

> Scottsdale's boutique luxury landscape design, build, and maintenance company. Ten-plus years of estate-standard craftsmanship for Silverleaf, Paradise Valley, DC Ranch, Troon, Desert Mountain, Arcadia, Camelback Corridor, and the greater Phoenix Valley.

## About

- **Business name**: Nature Formed Landscaping Co.
- **Founded**: operating for 10+ years under original ownership; LLC filed 2024
- **Owner**: Jonathan Romero
- **Location**: 1701 E Meadowbrook Ave, Phoenix, AZ 85016
- **Phone**: (602) 517-2134 (primary), (623) 219-7121 (secondary)
- **Email**: NatureFormedCo@gmail.com
- **Google rating**: 5.0 stars
- **Price range**: $$$
- **Tagline**: "Formed By Nature. Refined By Us."

## Primary Service Area (luxury focus)

- Silverleaf at DC Ranch, Scottsdale
- DC Ranch, Scottsdale
- Troon North, Scottsdale
- Desert Mountain, Scottsdale
- Estancia, Scottsdale
- Grayhawk, Scottsdale
- Whisper Rock, Scottsdale
- North Scottsdale
- Paradise Valley, AZ
- Arcadia, Phoenix
- Camelback Corridor, Phoenix
- Biltmore, Phoenix
- Central Phoenix
- Cave Creek
- Carefree
- Fountain Hills

## Extended Service Area

- Tempe, Gilbert, Mesa, Chandler, Queen Creek, Ahwatukee, Glendale, Peoria

## Services

1. **Landscape Design & Planning** — Custom layouts, plant selection, phased implementation for Arizona desert climate
2. **Patios, Pavers & Travertine Hardscape** — Custom patios, pool decks, retaining walls, seat walls, travertine, porcelain, natural stone
3. **Sod & Synthetic Grass Installation** — Premium sod, synthetic turf, putting greens, soil prep
4. **Smart Irrigation & Sprinkler Systems** — Design, install, repair; drip, smart controllers, seasonal adjustments
5. **Outdoor Lighting Design & Repair** — Low-voltage path, uplighting, accent, security
6. **Tree & Garden Care** — Trimming, removal, planting, fertilization, seasonal maintenance
7. **Pressure Washing** — Driveways, patios, pool decks, walkways
8. **One-Time Cleanups & Routine Care** — Weekly / bi-weekly / monthly
9. **Junk Removal & Site Clearing** — Post-project, seasonal, full site clearing
10. **Custom Projects** — Bespoke outdoor builds, estate-level work

## Signature Offering: Discreet Mode

Discreet Mode is Nature Formed's low-noise, low-disruption maintenance service. Designed for remote workers, home-based businesses, and high-profile Scottsdale estates that value focus and privacy:

- 100% professional electric equipment (no gas engines)
- Quiet, respectful crews — no chatter, no engine idling
- Uniformed staff; unmarked vehicles available on request
- Available for weekly maintenance clients Valley-wide

- **Maurice Harding** (★★★★★) — "On time, very detailed, courteous and professional."
- **Ladaisha Henderson** (★★★★★) — "So amazing! Loved the results!"

## Long-Term Client Reviews

- **Catherine & Mike F., Gilbert** (13 years) — "We've been customers of Nature Formed for 13 years and couldn't be happier. The crew always know exactly what needs to be done and do it exceptionally well."
- **Eileen S., Tempe** (10+ years) — "Nature Formed have been my landscapers for over 10 years and have always done a great job."
- **Ivy C., Scottsdale** — "I've used the Nature Formed team for several years at my daughters' homes in Scottsdale and Phoenix. Professional, reliable, and incredibly knowledgeable."
- **Lisa W., Scottsdale** — "Nature Formed installed new landscaping for me three years ago and did a beautiful job. Since then, they've become my go-to team — handling everything from regular maintenance to a full backyard remodel."
- **Edward H., Phoenix** (~10 years) — "I've used Nature Formed and the team for nearly 10 years. Always been reliable, honest, and capable."
- **Dianne R., Mesa** (~10 years) — "They do an excellent job. They are also the most reliable people that have ever worked for me."

Monday–Saturday: 9 AM – 5 PM · Sunday: Closed
